overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city during golden hour. The character traverses elevated walkways, crosses intersections, and walks through covered underpasses in a dense urban environment with holographic advertisements and mixed pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront promenade with neon signage

events.description: approaching intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and waiting vehicles
stepping off elevated walkway onto asphalt crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated path beside water canal, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving parallel to the walkway along the street

entered.detail: calm water reflecting the surrounding buildings and neon lights
raised pedestrian path with red painted edges running alongside the canal
green and red painted metal barriers separating walkway from street
large vertical digital billboard displaying 'A DREAM' with blue crystalline graphics
massive concrete overpass with red neon trim spanning across the district
tall industrial pole with multiple crossbars and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated concrete promenade beside a calm canal during golden hour. Neon billboards and massive overhead highway structures dominate the skyline, while the warm sunlight casts long shadows across the path. The character approaches an intersection where vehicles wait at the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and crosswalk

events.description: crossing from elevated waterfront walkway onto street level asphalt
turning corner into direct sunlight causing bright lens flare and washed out exposure

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at crosswalk and continuing along commercial sidewalk past various storefronts

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair and beige coat walking in same direction along sidewalk

entered.detail: dark paved street with yellow crosswalk stripes and red curb markings
corner building with bright pink neon signage and japanese characters
row of shops with illuminated signs and digital displays at street level
multiple hanging screens displaying advertisements above the street

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the asphalt road at a marked crosswalk, entering a commercial district with vibrant pink neon storefronts. The camera turns a corner into direct golden hour sunlight, creating a bright lens flare effect. Various pedestrians walk along the sidewalk, and digital billboards hang overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront walkway with large holographic building displays

events.description: returning to waterfront promenade with view of canal and holographic structures

agents.ego_description: walking along waterfront path passing a seated individual resting near a digital terminal

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench next to digital information kiosk

entered.detail: calm waterway reflecting the green holographic displays and surrounding architecture
tall structure projecting massive green wireframe holographic graphics into the air
futuristic terminal with glowing pink screen displaying text and interface elements
temporary yellow plastic barriers lining the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the waterfront promenade, where a massive green holographic building dominates the right side of the frame. The canal reflects the neon and holographic lights. A person sits on a bench near a digital kiosk, and yellow construction barriers line the path as the character walks toward a covered underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with palm trees and structural columns

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath massive overpass structure
exiting covered underpass back into bright golden hour sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through covered underpass section with palm trees lining the path, passing multiple pedestrians

entered.detail: shadowed walkway beneath massive concrete highway structure with geometric light patterns
tall palm trees lining the left side of the walkway creating tropical atmosphere
thick industrial steel columns supporting the overhead highway structure
metal barrel with open fire providing warm orange light in the shaded area

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered underpass beneath the highway structure, where palm trees and metal support beams line the path. A burning barrel provides warm light in the shadows. The character continues through the semi-covered walkway, eventually emerging back into the bright golden hour sunlight as the path continues toward the distant city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene elevated promenade into the vibrant, light-drenched bustle of a commercial district. It begins with the character walking beside a calm canal under the shadow of massive overhead highways and neon billboards during the golden hour. As the character approaches a busy intersection, the camera follows them across an asphalt road and into a dense urban area defined by glowing pink storefronts. The scene then shifts as the camera turns a corner, moving from the shaded street into direct sunlight that triggers a bright lens flare. Finally, the view opens up to a crowded sidewalk filled with pedestrians and hanging digital advertisements under the warm evening sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, holographic waterfront promenade into a shadowed urban underpass before emerging back into the open city. It begins along a canal reflecting neon lights, passing a massive green holographic building and yellow construction barriers as the character walks toward a covered structure. As the camera enters the underpass beneath a highway, the bright city colors shift into deep shadows punctuated by the warm glow of a burning barrel and the silhouettes of palm trees and metal beams. The scene then transitions from this dim, industrial corridor back into the brilliant light of the golden hour. Finally, the path opens up completely, revealing a clear view toward the distant city center.
